concerns.text: SC-002 references 'every alloy family' but 'alloy family' is not defined in the spec. What constitutes an alloy family (e.g., by composition range, crystal structure, or source dataset)? Without this definition, the success criterion cannot be verified.

Independent Test states 'held-out test split (e.g., a typical proportion of the data)' — 'typical proportion' is vague. Specify a concrete ratio (e.g., 20%, 30%) or a minimum sample count to make this testable.
